hero.headline: Give the gift of an afternoon off.
hero.subline: Spa Paradise gift cards never expire, carry no fees, and arrive by email in a minute.

steps.heading: How to gift and redeem (step by step)

items.title: Choose a gift card
items.body: Pick $50, $100, $150, or a treatment gift card, then click Buy under the option you want.

items.title: Enter recipient details
items.body: In the gift popup, enter the recipient's name and email so we can deliver the certificate directly.

items.title: Checkout securely
items.body: Continue to Stripe Checkout, enter buyer contact info, apply a promo code if needed, and complete the order.

items.title: Recipient redeems
items.body: The recipient gets a gift card email with certificate code and balance link. They can book online/by phone and show the code at check-in.

featurePanel.heading: Corporate & bulk gifting
featurePanel.body: Thank a team or delight clients with Spa Paradise gift cards. Tell us what you need and we'll set it up.

seo.title: Spa Gift Cards | Spa Paradise Middletown, NY
seo.description: Buy spa & massage gift cards in Middletown, NY. Never expire, no fees, emailed in a minute. Amounts or specific treatments — corporate gifting available.
seo.h1: Give the gift of an afternoon off.
